samples.xml_description:
<module id="div_16bit">
    <description>Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers. The inputs are two 8-bit operands. The module accepts a dividend and a divisor as inputs and provides a 16-bit result containing both the quotient and the remainder.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="clk">Clock.</input>
        <input id="rst">Reset.</input>
        <input id="sign">Signed or unsigned operation.</input>
        <input id="dividend" width_description="[7:0]">Dividend.</input>
        <input id="divisor" width_description="[7:0]">Divisor.</input>
        <input id="opn_valid">Valid operation.</input>
        <input id="res_ready">Result ready for the output.</input>
        <output id="res_valid">Result valid.</output>
        <output id="result" width_description="[15:0]">Result.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <parameter id="IDLE">0</parameter>
        <parameter id="SUB">1</parameter>
        <parameter id="mux_sel_0">2</parameter>
        <parameter id="mux_sel_1">3</parameter>
        <parameter id="shift">4</parameter>
        <parameter id="check_cnt">5</parameter>
        <parameter id="update_remainder">6</parameter>
        <parameter id="update_quotient">7</parameter>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description>
        <variable id="sub_result" width_description="[16:0]">Subtractor result.</variable>
        <variable id="mux_sel">Subtractor result.</variable>
        <variable id="neg_divisor" width_description="[15:0]">Negated divisor.</variable>
        <variable id="sr" width_description="[16:0]">Shift register.</variable>
        <variable id="cnt" width_description="[3:0]">Counter.</variable>
        <variable id="done">Done.</variable>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        <paras>
            <para id="1">On opn_valid, save inputs and initialize shift register.</para>
            <para id="2">On the next clock, if the counter is not zero, perform subtraction.</para>
            <para id="3">If the subtraction result is negative, select the previous value.</para>
            <para id="4">Shift the shift register and increment the counter.</para>
            <para id="5">If the counter is 8, set done.</para>
            <para id="6">If done, set the quotient and remainder.</para>
            <para id="7">If res_ready is high, set res_valid low.</para>
        </paras>
        <always>
            <para id="1">if(opn_valid && !res_valid)</para>
            <para id="1.1">dividend_128 << = {dividend, 8'b0};</para>
            <para id="1.2">divisor_16 << = {divisor, 8'b0};</para>
            <para id="1.3">cnt <= 4'b1;</para>
            <para id="1.4">start_cnt <= 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="1.5">NEG_DIVISOR << = (~divisor_16) + 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="1.6">rst_cnt <= 1'b0;</para>
        </always>
        <always>
            <para id="2">if(start_cnt)</para>
            <para id="2.1">if(cnt[3])</para>
            <para id="2.1.1">done <= 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="2.1.2">start_cnt <= 1'b0;</para>
            <para id="2.2">sub_result << = sr + NEG_DIVISOR;</para>
            <para id="2.3">mux_sel << = sub_result[16];</para>
            <para id="3">else</para>
            <para id="3.1">mux_sel << = 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="3.2">sub_result << = sr;</para>
        </always>
        <always>
            <para id="4">if(start_cnt)</para>
            <para id="4.1">if(!done)</para>
            <para id="4.1.1">cnt <= cnt + 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="4.1.2">sr << = {sub_result[15:0], 1'b0};</para>
            <para id="4.2">if(done)</para>
            <para id="4.2.1">sr[15:8] << = sr[15:8] | sub_result[15:8];</para>
            <para id="4.3">if(done)</para>
            <para id="4.3.1">if(sign)</para>
            <para id="4.3.2">if(dividend[7]^divisor[7])</para>
            <para id="4.3.3">sr[15:8] << = ~sr[15:8] + 1'b1;</para>
            <para id="4.4">if(done)</para>
            <para id="4.4.1">if(sign)</para>
            <para id="4.4.2">if(dividend[7]^divisor[7])</para>
            <para id="4.4.3">sr[7:0] << = ~sr[7:0] + 1'b1;</para>
        </always>
        <always>
            <para id="5">if(done)</para>
            <para id="5.1">if(!res_valid)</para>
            <para id="5.1.1">res_valid <= 1'b1;</para>
        </always>
        <always>
            <para id="6">if(res_valid)</para>
            <para id="6.1">if(res_ready)</para>
            <para id="6.1.1">res_valid <= 1'b0;</para>
        </always>
        <assign id="7">res_valid = rst ? 1'b0 : (cnt[3] ? 1'b0 : 1'b1);</assign>
        <assign id="8">result = sr[15:8] | sub_result[15:8];</assign>
    </implementation>
</module>
